_comment: Per-actor memX API keys. Copy to acl.json and replace placeholder keys with real secrets. Scope syntax: fnmatch glob, matches BOTH read and write (memX local ACL does not split permissions).
_index_visibility_comment: The narrow ``private:*:value:shared_index`` and ``private:*:value:private_index`` and ``private:*:value:user_profile`` grants on every principal key let the context-builder surface peer key-name listings and stitch peer USER profiles. The relation-gating (which peer counts) lives in the policy engine + nanobot/agent/context.py — these grants are the lower memX layer that actually allows the cross-principal HTTP read.
_agent_comment: agent_self_key — agent's own scratchpad (shared memory only). dream_consolidator_key — cross-scope read/write for nightly consolidation, registered only on dream-agent.
